title: CC: Recrafted
description: Changes the ComputerCraft recipes to be more challenging by using the Create Mod.
body:
This mod was created to modify the recipes in the **CC:Tweaked** mod, adding more difficulty to CC by using the **Create** mod, incorporating machines from there, sequenced assembly, compacting, and more.

I chose to make this a mod rather than a datapack because of Forge’s expanded capabilities, the ability to add custom items, and the ease of installation.

If you would like to translate the mod, have found a bug, or want to suggest something new:

 **Discord**: Cyber_Jellyfish
